steps.title: Find the established threshold
steps.content: The experiment showed that European peacock butterflies with approximately 300 pC possess charge that is “sufficiently high to facilitate electrostatic pollen transfer.” This establishes 300 pC as a threshold that works.

steps.title: Check which other species exceed the threshold
steps.content:
According to the graph, Anna's hummingbirds have approximately 800 pC, well above 300 pC.

If 300 pC is sufficient for the effect, then 800 pC would also facilitate it.

Those choices, and D contradict this reasoning by claiming opposite tendencies, misreading the minimum needed, or suggesting excess charge prevents the effect.

That confirms C is correct.
